final_head_evidence_policy.reason: Committing a tree artifact changes the head it describes; the stable final head is therefore reconstructed after repository freeze and bound in PR metadata without another repository commit.

corrections.protocol_point: Protocol v3.1 section 2 exact-head binding and no cross-commit evidence combination
corrections.action: Remove stale current-head claims and bind final head after repository freeze.
corrections.test: Compare every current claim to final PR head.
corrections.negative_control: Historical d5afcf5 evidence presented as current proof must fail.
corrections.pass_criteria: Final PR metadata names the exact head and separates historical evidence.
corrections.residual_risk: Future commits invalidate the final-head binding.

corrections.protocol_point: Declared M0 forbidden paths and pre-change boundary control
corrections.action: Record the temporary tools modification as a protocol breach despite rollback.
corrections.test: Incident and rollback SHAs remain visible.
corrections.negative_control: Zero net diff interpreted as compliance must fail.
corrections.pass_criteria: Breach remains recorded and no PASS is derived.

corrections.protocol_point: Explicit stage/tool permission before a new modifying mechanism
corrections.action: Record missing permission and keep remediation evidence-only.
corrections.test: WO-M0-012 changes no product, test, tool or workflow path.
corrections.pass_criteria: Current remediation remains evidence-only; original breach remains recorded.
corrections.residual_risk: Original permission defect cannot be retroactively cured.

corrections.protocol_point: Claim cannot exceed evidence; exact-head and absence claims are scoped
corrections.action: Reopen duplicate risk and revoke migration authorization.
corrections.test: Full gate OPEN; all authorization flags false.
corrections.negative_control: Filename-only absence or historical-head transfer must fail.
corrections.rollback_condition: Migration or manager/specialist authorization becomes true.
corrections.residual_risk: Current-head transfer and dynamic/external absence remain open.

corrections.action: Reconstruct final tracked set from d5afcf5 tree plus complete final evidence-only diff.
corrections.test: Final head, changed paths, count, unique paths and canonical hash in PR metadata.
corrections.negative_control: Any runtime path change or truncated compare fails transfer.
corrections.pass_criteria: Final-head tracked set reconstructed and 195 runtime blobs unchanged.
corrections.rollback_condition: Diff is incomplete or contains forbidden/runtime paths.
corrections.residual_risk: Static proof does not cover untracked/external state.

corrections.protocol_point: Traceability, negative controls and semantic duplicate coverage
corrections.action: Content-cover all 195 tracked runtime surfaces at historical head.
corrections.test: 165 package exact blobs + 30 repo-only exact blobs = 195; missing 0.
corrections.negative_control: Neutral alpha.py with work-order semantics must be detected.
corrections.pass_criteria: 195/195 historical tracked runtime surfaces covered and neutral-name control trips.
corrections.rollback_condition: Coverage count/hash or negative control fails.
corrections.residual_risk: Current-head transfer and dynamic/external absence are separate requirements.

corrections.action: Reconcile RTM, conflicts, architecture, state, ledger and PR metadata.
corrections.negative_control: One stale RESOLVED or authorization field fails reconciliation.
corrections.pass_criteria: All active artifacts remain fail-closed and current-head scope is explicit.

corrections.protocol_point: No milestone/release completion while any mandatory status is open
corrections.action: Keep M0 and release gates closed.
corrections.test: Evaluate all correction and RTM statuses.
corrections.negative_control: Completion with one open correction must fail.
corrections.pass_criteria: No completion or release authorization is emitted.
corrections.residual_risk: Open implementation and L4/L5 blockers remain.
